phases.name: contract-inventory
phases.precondition: - Migration status is active for this phase and no earlier phase is incomplete. - `src/continuous_refactoring/prompts.py` and `tests/test_prompts.py` are present and readable. - No concurrent edit is in progress on the same migration workspace.

phases.effort_reason: Consolidation changes many string-assembly sites where subtle wording drift could break parsing and tests.
phases.name: contract-consolidation
phases.precondition: - Phase 1 contract inventory is complete and available. - The consolidation target clauses/helpers are identified with explicit must-preserve constraints. - Current public symbols and call sites that depend on prompt text shape are identified.

phases.effort_reason: Requires careful test-shape redesign to reduce brittleness without weakening contract checks.
phases.name: test-hardening
phases.precondition: - Phase 2 consolidation is complete and prompt outputs are stable. - Invariant anchors to assert are finalized from the contract inventory. - No unresolved intentional interface-change decisions remain for this migration.

phases.name: final-verification-and-review-note
phases.precondition: - Phases 1–3 are complete. - Consolidated prompt logic and hardened tests are merged in this migration workspace. - Any potential interface-sensitive wording deltas are enumerated.
